title: Add tokio-socks to workspace Cargo.toml
description:
Add tokio-socks crate as a workspace dependency so nie-core can create async SOCKS5 tunnels.

## What
Add tokio-socks = '0.5' to [workspace.dependencies] in the root Cargo.toml, and tokio-socks.workspace = true to core/Cargo.toml [dependencies].

## Algorithm
1. In /home/mark/WORK/nie/Cargo.toml section [workspace.dependencies], add line: tokio-socks = '0.5'
2. In /home/mark/WORK/nie/core/Cargo.toml section [dependencies], add line: tokio-socks.workspace = true
3. Run: cargo build -p nie-core 2>&1 | tail -5 (verify exits 0 and tokio-socks resolves)

## Defensive programming rules
- Pin exact major.minor (0.5) — do not use '*' or '>=' ranges
- No extra features needed; the default feature set includes tcp::Socks5Stream
- If build fails, check crates.io for correct crate name (it is 'tokio-socks', not 'tokio_socks')

## Agent team
Single implementer (trivial Cargo.toml edit + cargo build verification)

## Tests
Acceptance: cargo build -p nie-core exits 0 with tokio-socks in the dependency tree (cargo tree -p nie-core | grep tokio-socks)
acceptance_criteria: cargo build -p nie-core exits 0; cargo tree -p nie-core shows tokio-socks in deps
